templates.name: How do I register my boots?
templates.content: You can register your product here: https://www.ariat.com/register-product

templates.name: Does it cost to be a member?/ Is membership free?
templates.content: The Ariat Insider Program is a free rewards program open to U.S. residents (excluding Puerto Rico and U.S. territories) who are at least 16 years of age, who provide and maintain a working email address, and have an online account at ariat.com. Membership in the Program ("Membership") is free and optional.

templates.name: Rewards
templates.content: We have an Ariat Insider program for 24/7 free shipping and returns, VIP access, and more member-only perks! Check it out here: https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/JbRvn7KT

templates.name: How should I store my boots?
templates.content: It's best to store your boots upright, in a cool, dry location. Please note that your boots are meant to be worn, and materials will degrade even if the boots are left unopened in their original box.

templates.name: How should I care for my full-grain leather products?
templates.content: Look for a cleaner and conditioner specifically designed for full-grain leather. Follow the instructions on the cleaner you purchase, and be sure to test the cleaner on a small, inconspicuous area of leather before using it on the entire product.

templates.name: How should I polish my leather boots?
templates.content: Please follow these easy steps to polish your leather boots and make them look like new again: https://www.ariat.com/al/how-to-polish-leather-boots

templates.name: How should I care for my nubuck, suede, and distressed leather products?
templates.content: Look for a cleaner, conditioner, and brush specifically designed for nubuck, suede, or distressed leather. Follow the instructions on the cleaner you purchase, and be sure to test the cleaner on a small, inconspicuous area of leather before using it on the entire product.

templates.name: How should I clean my leather Cowboy Boots?
templates.content: We've put together this comprehensive guide to show you how to clean cowboy boots properly, along with some extra tips and hacks for cleaning leather cowboy boots: https://www.ariat.com/al/how-to-clean-cowboy-boots

templates.name: Do you offer replacement insoles?
templates.content: Yes! You can check them out here: https://www.ariat.com/insoles

templates.name: How should I clean my riding boots?
templates.content: You can take a look at the video and how-to guide at the following link on how to clean leather riding boots and keep them in condition for a long time to come: https://www.ariat.com/al/how-to-clean-riding-boots

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://returns.narvar.com/ariat/returns

templates.name: How should I wash/care for your apparel products?
templates.content: Please look for the tag on the inside of your clothing for specific care instructions.

templates.name: How do I write a review?
templates.content: Go to our site, select the style you want to do a review on, and scroll down towards the bottom, where you'll see the heading "PRODUCT REVIEWS". Click on that and you'll be able to write a review on that style.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at info@ariat.com Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at info@ariat.com  Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content:
Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/ariatinternational/ 
and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/AriatInternational

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Once your order is placed, we work as fast as we can to get it to you. We can't cancel or make any changes to an order once it's placed. If you're not completely satisfied with your Ariat product, we offer free domestic returns within 90 days of purchase.

templates.name: Can I order online and pick up in store?
templates.content:
Yes, we do offer a in-store pick-up. Just find the closest store near you and give us a call on the store number. 
Here you can find the store that suits you the best: https://www.ariat.com/retailers

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Order processing takes 1-2 business days. We usually ship via UPS or FedEx and once shipped, it will take 8-12 business days.

templates.name: Warranty policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed warranty policy here: https://www.ariat.com/warranty

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://www.ariat.com/online-returns

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at info@ariat.com, live chat with one of our agents via the website or give us a call at  877-702-7428. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: Free ground shipping is available to Ariat Insider Program members. If you are not an Ariat Insider Program member yet, you can join here: https://www.ariat.com/on/demandware.store/Sites-Ariat-Site/en_US/Login-Show

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 877-702-7428 Mon. - Fri. 5am-7pm (PST) & Sat. 7am-4pm (PST) or let me know if there's anything I can help with.

templates.name: ESCALATION template
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to use this form here: https://www.ariat.com/contact-us and your question will be routed to the correct department.

templates.name: Can I exchange my item?
templates.content: For the fastest and most accurate processing of your return and replacement order we don't process direct exchanges, however, you may return and re-order in two separate transactions. We offer free and easy returns within 90 days of purchase, and you can initiate your return here: https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/IdRTREVB

templates.name: Are the soles comfortable?
templates.content: Yes, they are. Our boots are engineered for comfort and styled to stand out. The boots have a lightweight and flexible bantamweight sole. They also come with a removable pro performance insole for cushioning and shock absorption.

templates.name: Do you have financing/installment?
templates.content: We do offer AfterPay as a financing method! You can find and pay through After Pay at the checkout screen. Hope this helps!

templates.name: What do perfect rise jeans look like?
templates.content: This photo can help show the difference - https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/ZAomemXr

templates.name: What's the difference between the Fatbaby Western Boot and the Fatbaby ll Western Boot?
templates.content: The Fatbaby II style has ATS forked shank for enhanced support compared to the 4LR stabilizing shank in the Fatbaby style. In terms of the fabric, the Fatbaby II style has premium full-grain leather foot and suede upper whereas the Fatbaby offers leather for both the foot and upper. Hope this helps!

templates.name: Do you buy used boots? Secondhand?
templates.content: We do have our Reboot Resale option for you to take advantage of! More information on that here: https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/BZtW7b3V And you may start selling here: https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/-t2o6j4U Hope this helps!

templates.name: Can your boots be resoled/restored?
templates.content: NuShoe offers a full range of repairs on most of our work, Western and English boots. You can get started on the process here: https://ariatbootrenewal.com/

templates.name: Wide feet for women's shoes
templates.content: We actually have an extended women's size collection here: https://www.ariat.com/search?q=women%E2%80%99s%20wide%20foot%20boots and an article to help with selecting boots for wide feet - https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/ttgl5T1T

templates.name: Payment methods
templates.content: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Discover, and American, Express, PayPal, Afterpay, Apple Pay and Ariat gift cards

templates.name: Do your cowboy boots have good arch support?
templates.content:
Our cowboy boots have great arch support. Ariat ATS footbeds have increased cushioning, providing stability and support throughout your entire foot. ATS Max takes it a step further with a shock-absorbing EVA midsole and an extra-wide shank. Some of our cowboy boots that offer great arch support are:
Heritage Roughstock Western Boot: https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/DD5LLaYY
and Rambler Western Boot:
https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/sQlUMRws

templates.name: Where can I buy a physical gift card?
templates.content: To buy a physical Ariat gift card, visit any Ariat Brand Store. You can find us at a store near you here: https://ariat.attn.tv/sl/3mb3XUws

templates.name: First responder discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! You can get your discount here: https://www.ariat.com/first-responders-discount

templates.name: Expedited Shipping
templates.content: We have expedited shipping options available depending on the shipping address. Expedited Orders placed before 8 am EST Monday-Friday will ship the same day.

templates.name: Custom Boots
templates.content: Unfortunately, we do not make custom boots, nor can we modify existing boots.

templates.name: Where is your headquarters?
templates.content: Our headquarters is located in Union City, CA.

templates.name: When will I get my refund?
templates.content: Please allow 12-14 business days from receipt at our warehouse for your return credit to be processed.
